2.2 简化时变密度泛函理论

source_text: a _ { x }is the amount of non-local Fock exchange in the density functional (e.g. 0.2 for B3LYP). This approach has proven to yield more reliable transition moments and there- fore better UV/VIS and ECD spectra than sTDA (see Ref. 2 for more information).
translated_text: a _ { x }是密度泛函中非局域Fock交换的量（例如B3LYP为0.2）。该方法已被证明能产生更可靠的跃迁矩，因此比sTDA提供更好的UV/VIS和ECD光谱（更多信息参见参考文献2）。
